data.description:
Strangler-fig migration with public API preserved.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] review_ticket/review_code/scan_spec reframed as built-in workflows; public API preserved via forwarding shims.
- [ ] Parallel-run-and-diff old vs new path before cutover; never delete a documented entry point in the same step.
Files: src/rebar/llm/operations.py, src/rebar/llm/code_review.py, src/rebar/llm/spec_scan.py
data.title: WS-K2: Reframe review_ticket/review_code/scan_spec as workflows (shims)
